---
title: "Documentation"
sidebar: documentation
---

This section covers the installation, usage and technical background of the
BasicSpanner desktop application.

## Contents

- [**Installation**](installation.qmd) — how to obtain the pre-built binaries
  or build from source on Linux and Windows.
- [**Getting started**](getting-started.qmd) — a minimal end-to-end walkthrough
  using the example graph shipped with the repository.
- [**Workflow**](workflow.qmd) — a detailed description of the graphical
  interface and the analysis pipeline.
- [**Algorithm**](algorithm.qmd) — formal statement of the heuristic used to
  compute basic networks.
- [**File formats**](file-formats.qmd) — accepted input formats and structure
  of the exported results.
